TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Gukut = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Syorinsyang ka alang Gukut. 174 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 543 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 508 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 35 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 83%, Amis 3%, Tayal 4%, Paiwan 2%, ni rahuq na o 3%. Pusu nniqan alang Muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjil hini ka seejiq Truku. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang He-ping. Gasuc Gaga mniq hunac He-ping-cyu 2km, hunac o lutuc He-jen-se-cyu, hraan hidaw o ga siyaw bi gsilung, gqiyan hidaw o ga siyaw bi ddgiyaq. Ti-ri lnglingay Breenux pslian yayung, kana knjisan o 30m. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Tay9 syeyn kndadax Nan-aw mtmay Su-hwa-kung-ru, gaga brah elug bling rhngaw He-ping na alang o kika alang He-cung. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari Truku, Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu eniq Cing-mwo He-ping-cyu o niqan maspac alang Truku, prajing nuda empsaping Nihung "rima hngkwasan ri-fan ci-hwa ", ga kmlawa kana ka nealang seejiq ni muri tnhjil. Bukuy tnjiyal do seasug mtru alang, hangan seuxal han o"He-ping"pusu nniqan Ku-ku-c na alang hangan o He-cung, yaasa ga mniq kska He-ping ni alang He-jen, kiya ni tmhangan dha "He-cung". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Saan rmigaw ‚óéParu ddgiyaq Nan-hu-ta-san. Gaga daya gqiyan hidaw nsgan Bsuring ka Nan-hu-ta-san, knjisan ddgiyaq o 3,742, saw bi paru bi hnigan niya ni burux bi naq hiya, mniq saw tgrima paru bi dgiyaq o mniq tgspac paru dgiyaq ka dgiyaq nii, kika mniq Truku na Kwo-cya-kung-yuan o tgkingal bi paru dgiyaq. Niqan saw mniq babaw dgiyaq na hruan spriq, rnaaw, lmiqu, ni ana manu ida nkiya na ddgiyaq, kngkwasan misan kjiyax o niqan huda ka tunux ddgiyaq. . Pnyahan pnatas Hangan alang Alang Gukut Tukubeycu na alang Alang Gukut (Alang Hecong) pa pnkixan tnhdilan Tanah Tunux na alang nniqan Seejiq Truku. Nniqan niya Nyusan Skangki Bsuring go Heping cwen Knlbangan Wa mniq Heping secyu tuhunac 2 km, tuhunac u lmutuc alang Hejn, hnruwan hidaw pa mquri ucilung, pryaxan hidaw u sdahar dwiyaq. Nniqan lnglingay Brnux dxral snbrxan ucilung, haypa 30 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Malu muda Tay 9 seyng mquri Nanaw mtmay elu paru Suhwa, alang pnsliyan mniq brah bling elu Heping pa kiya ka Alang Gukuc (Alang Hecong). Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Seejiq Truku. Sduwi na kari saya Kari Seejiq Truku, kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Hecong Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Teyngs kyokay. Pnyahan alang Balay bay mniq brah qnlhangan Tanah Tunux cida han pa ida bay niqan mspac alang Seejiq Truku ka ssiyaw Alang Gukut (Alang Hecong), spuda dndulan heytay Tanah Tunux ka "Bnkuwan Keykaku Rima Kngkawas Qmlahang Dsediq", wada dha pkixan tmhdil icil ka txtaxa alang. Babaw mnhdu Mccbu Tudha Kana Mtqiri Knlangan daw wada psuwan turu alang da, balay bay sunca nniqan "Heping" ka Gukut pa wada thnganan Hecong, alaw wada mniq iyax alang Heping mi alang Hejn, kiya ka wada thnganan "Hecong" da. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Sdhmawan qmita ‚óéNanhu Beyhing Dwiyaq. Qntan patas 'Patas Lntudan Marah Matas Nyusan Skangki' ‚Äď Patas Bnkuwan Kluwanan Sediq. 'Ndanan Sediq Tnpusu Taiwan' ‚Äď Patas Bnkuwan Ndanan Tayal. Cyeynswo sitong hangan dxral
S.PHON: = gukut = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn sjo…ĺinsjaŇč ka alaŇč gukut. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, t…ĺuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč mu…ĺi dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč tnńß…üil ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč alaŇč ńß…ô-piŇč. gasu ¶ gaga mniq ńßuna ¶ ńß…ô-piŇč- ¶ju *km, ńßuna ¶ o lutu ¶ ńß…ô-…ü…ôn-s…ô- ¶ju, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o ga sijaw bi gsiluŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o ga sijaw bi ddgijaq. ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj b…ĺ…ô…ônux pslian jajuŇč, kana kn…üisan o **m. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda taj* sj…ôn kndadax nan-aw mtmaj su-ńßwa-kuŇč-…ĺu, gaga b…ĺańß …ôlug bliŇč …ĺńßŇčaw ńß…ô-piŇč na alaŇč o kika alaŇč ńß…ô- ¶uŇč. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč t…ĺuku. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ĺuku, tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pnjańßan alaŇč pusu …ôniq ¶iŇč-mwo ńß…ô-piŇč- ¶ju o niqan maspa ¶ alaŇč t…ĺuku, p…ĺa…üiŇč nuda …ômpsapiŇč nińßuŇč "…ĺima ńßŇčkwasan …ĺi-*an ¶i-ńßwa ", ga kmlawa kana ka n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ni mu…ĺi tnńß…üil. bukuj tn…üijal do s…ôasug mt…ĺu alaŇč, ńßaŇčan s…ôuxal ńßan o"ńß…ô-piŇč"pusu nniqan ku-ku- ¶ na alaŇč ńßaŇčan o ńß…ô- ¶uŇč, jaasa ga mniq kska ńß…ô-piŇč ni alaŇč ńß…ô-…ü…ôn, kija ni tmńßaŇčan dńßa "ńß…ô- ¶uŇč". pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw saan …ĺmigaw *pa…ĺu ddgijaq nan-ńßu-ta-san. gaga daja gqijan ńßidaw nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč ka nan-ńßu-ta-san, kn…üisan ddgijaq o *,***, saw bi pa…ĺu bi ńßnigan nija ni bu…ĺux bi naq ńßija, mniq saw tg…ĺima pa…ĺu bi dgijaq o mniq tgspa ¶ pa…ĺu dgijaq ka dgijaq nii, kika mniq t…ĺuku na kwo- ¶ja-kuŇč-juan o tgkiŇčal bi pa…ĺu dgijaq. niqan saw mniq babaw dgijaq na ńß…ĺuan sp…ĺiq, …ĺnaaw, lmiqu, ni ana manu ida nkija na ddgijaq, kŇčkwasan misan k…üijax o niqan ńßuda ka tunux ddgijaq. . pnjańßan pnatas ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč gukut tukub…ô ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč gukut (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč) pa pnkixan tnńßdilan tanańß tunux na alaŇč nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. nniqan nija njusan skaŇčki bsu…ĺiŇč go ńß…ôpiŇč ¶w…ôn knlbaŇčan wa mniq ńß…ôpiŇč s…ô ¶ju tuńßuna ¶ * km, tuńßuna ¶ u lmutu ¶ alaŇč ńß…ô…ün, ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw pa mqu…ĺi u ¶iluŇč, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw u sdańßa…ĺ dwijaq. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj b…ĺnux dx…ĺal snb…ĺxan u ¶iluŇč, ńßajpa ** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: malu muda taj * s…ôŇč mqu…ĺi nanaw mtmaj …ôlu pa…ĺu suńßwa, alaŇč pnslijan mniq b…ĺańß bliŇč …ôlu ńß…ôpiŇč pa kija ka alaŇč guku ¶ (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč). ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku, ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ńß…ô ¶oŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, t…ôŇčs kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč balaj baj mniq b…ĺańß qnlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ¶ida ńßan pa ida baj niqan mspa ¶ alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku ka ssijaw alaŇč gukut (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč), spuda dndulan ńß…ôtaj tanańß tunux ka "bnkuwan k…ôkaku …ĺima kŇčkawas qmlańßaŇč ds…ôdiq", wada dńßa pkixan tmńßdil i ¶il ka txtaxa alaŇč. babaw mnńßdu m ¶ ¶bu tudńßa kana mtqi…ĺi knlaŇčan daw wada psuwan tu…ĺu alaŇč da, balaj baj sun ¶a nniqan "ńß…ôpiŇč" ka gukut pa wada tńßŇčanan ńß…ô ¶oŇč, alaw wada mniq ijax alaŇč ńß…ôpiŇč mi alaŇč ńß…ô…ün, kija ka wada tńßŇčanan "ńß…ô ¶oŇč" da. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw sdńßmawan qmita *nanńßu b…ôńßiŇč dwijaq. qntan patas 'patas lntudan ma…ĺańß matas njusan skaŇčki' * patas bnkuwan kluwanan s…ôdiq. 'ndanan s…ôdiq tnpusu taiwan' * patas bnkuwan ndanan tajal. ¶j…ônswo sitoŇč ńßaŇčan dx…ĺal
S.FORM: = Gukut = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Syorinsyang ka alang Gukut. 174 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 543 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 508 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 35 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 83%, Amis 3%, Tayal 4%, Paiwan 2%, ni rahuq na o 3%. Pusu nniqan alang Muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjil hini ka seejiq Truku. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang He-ping. Gasuc Gaga mniq hunac He-ping-cyu 2km, hunac o lutuc He-jen-se-cyu, hraan hidaw o ga siyaw bi gsilung, gqiyan hidaw o ga siyaw bi ddgiyaq. Ti-ri lnglingay Breenux pslian yayung, kana knjisan o 30m. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgriq rulu: Tduwa muda Tay9 syeyn kndadax Nan-aw mtmay Su-hwa-kung-ru, gaga brah elug bling rhngaw He-ping na alang o kika alang He-cung. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari Truku, Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu eniq Cing-mwo He-ping-cyu o niqan maspac alang Truku, prajing nuda empsaping Nihung "rima hngkwasan ri-fan ci-hwa ", ga kmlawa kana ka nealang seejiq ni muri tnhjil. Bukuy tnjiyal do seasug mtru alang, hangan seuxal han o"He-ping"pusu nniqan Ku-ku-c na alang hangan o He-cung, yaasa ga mniq kska He-ping ni alang He-jen, kiya ni tmhangan dha "He-cung". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Saan rmigaw ‚óéParu ddgiyaq Nan-hu-ta-san. Gaga daya gqiyan hidaw nsgan Bsuring ka Nan-hu-ta-san, knjisan ddgiyaq o 3,742, saw bi paru bi hnigan niya ni burux bi naq hiya, mniq saw tgrima paru bi dgiyaq o mniq tgspac paru dgiyaq ka dgiyaq nii, kika mniq Truku na Kwo-cya-kung-yuan o tgkingal bi paru dgiyaq. Niqan saw mniq babaw dgiyaq na hruan spriq, rnaaw, lmiqu, ni ana manu ida nkiya na ddgiyaq, kngkwasan misan kjiyax o niqan huda ka tunux ddgiyaq. . Pnyahan pnatas Hangan alang Alang Gukut Tukubeycu na alang Alang Gukut (Alang Hecong) pa pnkixan tnhdilan Tanah Tunux na alang nniqan Seejiq Truku. Nniqan niya Nyusan Skangki Bsuring go Heping cwen Knlbangan Wa mniq Heping secyu tuhunac 2 km, tuhunac u lmutuc alang Hejn, hnruwan hidaw pa mquri ucilung, pryaxan hidaw u sdahar dwiyaq. Nniqan lnglingay Brnux dxral snbrxan ucilung, haypa 30 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Malu muda Tay 9 seyng mquri Nanaw mtmay elu paru Suhwa, alang pnsliyan mniq brah bling elu Heping pa kiya ka Alang Gukuc (Alang Hecong). Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Seejiq Truku. Sduwi na kari saya Kari Seejiq Truku, kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Hecong Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Teyngs kyokay. Pnyahan alang Balay bay mniq brah qnlhangan Tanah Tunux cida han pa ida bay niqan mspac alang Seejiq Truku ka ssiyaw Alang Gukut (Alang Hecong), spuda dndulan heytay Tanah Tunux ka "Bnkuwan Keykaku Rima Kngkawas Qmlahang Dsediq", wada dha pkixan tmhdil icil ka txtaxa alang. Babaw mnhdu Mccbu Tudha Kana Mtqiri Knlangan daw wada psuwan turu alang da, balay bay sunca nniqan "Heping" ka Gukut pa wada thnganan Hecong, alaw wada mniq iyax alang Heping mi alang Hejn, kiya ka wada thnganan "Hecong" da. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Sdhmawan qmita ‚óéNanhu Beyhing Dwiyaq. Qntan patas 'Patas Lntudan Marah Matas Nyusan Skangki' ‚Äď Patas Bnkuwan Kluwanan Sediq. 'Ndanan Sediq Tnpusu Taiwan' ‚Äď Patas Bnkuwan Ndanan Tayal. Cyeynswo sitong hangan dxral
S.PHON: = gukut = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn sjo…ĺinsjaŇč ka alaŇč gukut. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, t…ĺuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč mu…ĺi dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč tnńß…üil ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč alaŇč ńß…ô-piŇč. gasu ¶ gaga mniq ńßuna ¶ ńß…ô-piŇč- ¶ju *km, ńßuna ¶ o lutu ¶ ńß…ô-…ü…ôn-s…ô- ¶ju, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o ga sijaw bi gsiluŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o ga sijaw bi ddgijaq. ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj b…ĺ…ô…ônux pslian jajuŇč, kana kn…üisan o **m. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: tduwa muda taj* sj…ôn kndadax nan-aw mtmaj su-ńßwa-kuŇč-…ĺu, gaga b…ĺańß …ôlug bliŇč …ĺńßŇčaw ńß…ô-piŇč na alaŇč o kika alaŇč ńß…ô- ¶uŇč. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč t…ĺuku. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ĺuku, tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pnjańßan alaŇč pusu …ôniq ¶iŇč-mwo ńß…ô-piŇč- ¶ju o niqan maspa ¶ alaŇč t…ĺuku, p…ĺa…üiŇč nuda …ômpsapiŇč nińßuŇč "…ĺima ńßŇčkwasan …ĺi-*an ¶i-ńßwa ", ga kmlawa kana ka n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ni mu…ĺi tnńß…üil. bukuj tn…üijal do s…ôasug mt…ĺu alaŇč, ńßaŇčan s…ôuxal ńßan o"ńß…ô-piŇč"pusu nniqan ku-ku- ¶ na alaŇč ńßaŇčan o ńß…ô- ¶uŇč, jaasa ga mniq kska ńß…ô-piŇč ni alaŇč ńß…ô-…ü…ôn, kija ni tmńßaŇčan dńßa "ńß…ô- ¶uŇč". pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw saan …ĺmigaw *pa…ĺu ddgijaq nan-ńßu-ta-san. gaga daja gqijan ńßidaw nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč ka nan-ńßu-ta-san, kn…üisan ddgijaq o *,***, saw bi pa…ĺu bi ńßnigan nija ni bu…ĺux bi naq ńßija, mniq saw tg…ĺima pa…ĺu bi dgijaq o mniq tgspa ¶ pa…ĺu dgijaq ka dgijaq nii, kika mniq t…ĺuku na kwo- ¶ja-kuŇč-juan o tgkiŇčal bi pa…ĺu dgijaq. niqan saw mniq babaw dgijaq na ńß…ĺuan sp…ĺiq, …ĺnaaw, lmiqu, ni ana manu ida nkija na ddgijaq, kŇčkwasan misan k…üijax o niqan ńßuda ka tunux ddgijaq. . pnjańßan pnatas ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč gukut tukub…ô ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč gukut (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč) pa pnkixan tnńßdilan tanańß tunux na alaŇč nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. nniqan nija njusan skaŇčki bsu…ĺiŇč go ńß…ôpiŇč ¶w…ôn knlbaŇčan wa mniq ńß…ôpiŇč s…ô ¶ju tuńßuna ¶ * km, tuńßuna ¶ u lmutu ¶ alaŇč ńß…ô…ün, ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw pa mqu…ĺi u ¶iluŇč, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw u sdańßa…ĺ dwijaq. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj b…ĺnux dx…ĺal snb…ĺxan u ¶iluŇč, ńßajpa ** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: malu muda taj * s…ôŇč mqu…ĺi nanaw mtmaj …ôlu pa…ĺu suńßwa, alaŇč pnslijan mniq b…ĺańß bliŇč …ôlu ńß…ôpiŇč pa kija ka alaŇč guku ¶ (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč). ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku, ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ńß…ô ¶oŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, t…ôŇčs kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč balaj baj mniq b…ĺańß qnlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ¶ida ńßan pa ida baj niqan mspa ¶ alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku ka ssijaw alaŇč gukut (alaŇč ńß…ô ¶oŇč), spuda dndulan ńß…ôtaj tanańß tunux ka "bnkuwan k…ôkaku …ĺima kŇčkawas qmlańßaŇč ds…ôdiq", wada dńßa pkixan tmńßdil i ¶il ka txtaxa alaŇč. babaw mnńßdu m ¶ ¶bu tudńßa kana mtqi…ĺi knlaŇčan daw wada psuwan tu…ĺu alaŇč da, balaj baj sun ¶a nniqan "ńß…ôpiŇč" ka gukut pa wada tńßŇčanan ńß…ô ¶oŇč, alaw wada mniq ijax alaŇč ńß…ôpiŇč mi alaŇč ńß…ô…ün, kija ka wada tńßŇčanan "ńß…ô ¶oŇč" da. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw sdńßmawan qmita *nanńßu b…ôńßiŇč dwijaq. qntan patas 'patas lntudan ma…ĺańß matas njusan skaŇčki' * patas bnkuwan kluwanan s…ôdiq. 'ndanan s…ôdiq tnpusu taiwan' * patas bnkuwan ndanan tajal. ¶j…ônswo sitoŇč ńßaŇčan dx…ĺal
